title: Advanced Armor Bar
description: Renders armor type, toughness, enchantments, and color
body:
This is a mod for [HotbarAPI](https://modrinth.com/mod/hotbarapi) thats replaces the default armor bar with a far more advanced one.

The new armor bar will render:
- Each type of armor you have equipped (with data driven support for other armor types).
- Whether the armor is enchanted or not. (Broken on 1.21.5 and onward. Blame mojang)
- Armor toughness.
- And the color of leather armor you are wearing!

If you are using this in a heavily-modded environment, it is recommended to use a mod such as [AttributeFix](https://modrinth.com/mod/attributefix) to uncap attribute values

config coming soon™
